evals.prompt: I just finished adding a new detail overview page for the network LB. The changes are in client/src/pages/network/ and client/src/composables/lb/. The ticket is LYCC-8687. Can you commit this for me?
evals.expected_output: A commit message like 'feat(lb): LYCC-8687: Add network LB detail overview page' — type should be feat, scope should be lb (not client or network), ticket LYCC-8687, sentence-case description starting with a verb.
expectations: Description is in sentence case (first letter uppercase)
Message matches pattern: type(scope): TICKET: Description

evals.prompt: commit my changes - i fixed a css bug in the mcp-hub styling, QA reported it as CLOUDQA-83659
evals.expected_output: A commit message like 'fix(mcp-hub): CLOUDQA-83659: Fix the style of manual config' — type should be fix, scope mcp-hub, CLOUDQA ticket pattern, sentence-case description.
expectations: Message matches pattern: type(scope): TICKET: Description

evals.prompt: i refactored the api-gateway config actions to use the new useModalManager pattern. no jira ticket for this one, just some cleanup. please commit
evals.expected_output: A commit message like 'refactor(api-gateway): NO-JIRA: Switch config actions to useModalManager flow' — type should be refactor, scope api-gateway, NO-JIRA, sentence-case description.
expectations: Message matches pattern: type(scope): TICKET: Description
